visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a wide perspective of a Costco warehouse interior. In the foreground, a large digital overlay features the Costco Wholesale logo, a cartoon character of a shouting man, and text announcing weekly special reports. The background shows wooden pallets stacked with cardboard boxes under bright, cool-toned industrial warehouse lighting. (2) The scene transitions to a medium shot of Kleenex toilet paper packages in purple wrapping, stacked on pallets. Yellow price labels are visible on the shelves in the distant background. The camera is slightly handheld, creating a dynamic shopping-trip feel. (3) A series of rapid cuts follows, showcasing various food products. First, packages of raw Iberico pork and local chicken are shown in refrigerated displays. The meat is pink and well-marinated, tightly sealed in plastic. The lighting here is bright and sterile, typical of a supermarket cooler. (4) The sequence continues through the dairy and snack aisles. Plastic cups of mango pudding with yellow fruit pieces are displayed, followed by blue cartons of I-Mei soy milk and white bottles of yogurt. The background remains consistent with retail shelving and distant shoppers moving occasionally. (5) The final phases show household goods and beverages. Containers of Orange House detergent are stacked in bulk. The camera then moves to aisles filled with canned juices, bottled water, and finally, rows of wine and beer boxes. High-contrast text overlays appear over every product to display pricing information.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 好市多 每週特價速報. [Slogan]: 09/01~09/07 記得追蹤我們. (2) [Subtitle]: 舒潔 三層抽取式衛生紙. [Slogan]: 原價419 -84 特價335. (3) [Subtitle]: 西班牙伊比利 豬梅花肉卷. [Slogan]: 原價839/KG -170 特價669/KG. (4) [Subtitle]: 台灣土雞 骨腿切塊. [Slogan]: 原價269/KG -54 特價215/KG. (5) [Subtitle]: 新鮮芒果奶酪 6入. [Slogan]: 原價389 -78 特價311 數量有限 售完為止. (6) [Subtitle]: 義美 5.3厚豆奶. [Slogan]: 原價149 -30 特價119. (7) [Subtitle]: 福樂 無加糖優酪乳. [Slogan]: 原價185 -40 特價145.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Occasional hands visible touching products; 2-3 distant shoppers in the background aisles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consistently features high-reaching warehouse shelves, wooden pallets, refrigerated display cases, and industrial warehouse ceiling structures with bright fluorescent lights.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, fast-tempo electronic pop music featuring a prominent 4/4 synthetic beat. A male narrator immediately speaks with a high arousal level and rapid speech rate, introducing Costco's weekly specials. The vocal tone is bright and professional. (2) As the video progresses, the narrator continuously lists product names and prices without long pauses. His delivery is percussive, matching the fast visual cuts. Subtle high-frequency UI sound effects are mixed in softly to accent the appearance of price text. (3) The background music remains consistent throughout the entire track, providing a constant energetic foundation. There are no ambient warehouse noises heard, indicating a post-produced voice-over. (4) The narrator maintains his enthusiastic projection until the final second, ending with a slight rising intonation to encourage viewers to follow. The master track exhibits a compressed broadcast-style dynamic range with high clarity.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Product Catalog -> Price Reveal -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a promotional tool for Costco members in Taiwan, systematically listing high-value discounts for the week of September 1st to September 7th to encourage store visits and sales. It uses high-energy narration and rapid editing to maintain viewer engagement through a long list of items.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The entire video is dedicated to listing discounted products at Costco, featuring brand logos, prices, and a call to action to track specials.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is highly optimized for social media, with a fast pace and large text overlays for easy mobile viewing. The consistent use of the same narrator and BGM style suggests a series of similar weekly updates.
